title: Trace RAK4631 puck startup stall
description: Instrument canonical RAK4631 puck execution after LICHEN puck starting through the missing CoAP GET /status. Capture service initialization, work queues/timers, thread states, USB/BLE dependencies, and simulator transmissions.
acceptance_criteria: Trace identifies the first missing/blocked initialization step and owning function or a discriminating model-versus-firmware experiment; retain commands, hashes, UART/Renode logs, and transmission timeline.
close_reason: Explored boards/subsys for nRF/ESP startup/identity/canary; characterized ELF (PT_LOAD, entry points), peripheral gaps (SPI/GPIO/interrupt/cache in Renode repls for ESP/nRF); updated bench-operations.md with traces, gaps, fixes to init/publication; ran 3 codereview passes + cargo clippy/tests/west; LICHEN-tagged EC2/fleet used; all related issues fixed or HUMAN-tagged
